final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input din0,
    input din1,
    input sel,
    output dout
);reg obf_dout_reg;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            obf_dout_reg <= 0;
        end else begin
            if (sel) begin
                obf_dout_reg <= din1;
            end else begin
                obf_dout_reg <= din0;
            end
        end
    end

    assign dout = obf_dout_reg;

endmodule
